HomePage.text: I'm an Angular developer with commercial experience and a passion for building modern web applications. I specialize in Angular and TypeScript, work with PostgreSQL daily, and actively develop my backend skills in ASP.NET Core. My goal is to write cleaner code, understand architecture deeply, and grow from junior towards senior level.

AboutPage.title: A little bit about me
AboutPage.p-1: I'm an Angular developer with commercial experience and a strong drive to keep growing. I specialize in Angular and TypeScript, work with PostgreSQL daily, and actively develop my backend skills in ASP.NET Core. I believe good code isn't just code that works — it's code others can understand too.
AboutPage.p-2: After graduating, I travelled and worked in different countries for several years, which allowed me to gain new perspectives and improve my language skills. I spent over two years in Vancouver, Canada, working in engineering and improving my English. Later I worked in Germany, which also gave me a basic understanding of German. Apart from that, I have travelled around Asia (Bali, Cambodia, Bangkok, Singapore) and Hawaii.
AboutPage.p-3: What drew me to programming was the same thing that once drew me to CNC machining — the urge to build things and solve problems. After more than ten years in manufacturing, I made a deliberate career change and spent four years teaching myself to code. I started with HTML, CSS and JavaScript, moved through React and Next.js, and eventually focused on Angular and .NET — the technologies I now work with commercially every day.
AboutPage.p-4: My biggest strength is the ability to learn fast and apply things directly in practice. Changing careers taught me that discipline and determination matter more than where you started — and that's exactly the mindset I bring to my growth as a developer.

blockquote.p-1: There is only one project on this page so far. This is because it is a key and complex project that involves most of the technologies and skills I have learned. Although I have done smaller projects, I have chosen to focus on this one because it best represents my work.
blockquote.p-2: I would like to assure you that I am already working on other interesting projects, which I will publish here soon. Thank you for your understanding and patience.

kanbanApp.shortDescription: Full-stack Kanban board application with Angular and ASP.NET Core.
kanbanApp.info: Kanbaan is a Kanban board application for task management that I'm actively building as a learning project. The backend in C# ASP.NET Core with PostgreSQL is complete, and I'm currently developing the Angular frontend. The goal is a fully functional board with authentication, column and task management including drag-and-drop reordering.

frontend.p-1: The frontend uses Angular 21 with standalone components. State management is handled by NgRx Signal Store with entity adapters, where services are responsible for HTTP calls and stores manage application state with reactive signals and computed properties.
frontend.p-2: The UI is built with PrimeNG 21 components and Tailwind CSS 4. For consistent styling, I created a custom Claude skill — a structured set of design rules and patterns that Claude Code follows when generating component styles. This approach speeds up development while keeping the design consistent across the entire application.
frontend.p-3: Authentication flow including login, registration, route guards and logout is fully implemented. The dashboard with sidebar navigation and board management is functional, and column management with reordering is in place. Task and subtask features are next on the roadmap.

backend.p-1: The backend runs on ASP.NET Core 10 with a repository pattern that cleanly separates data access from controller logic. API endpoints are secured with cookie-based authentication via ASP.NET Identity, returning proper HTTP status codes instead of redirects for the SPA frontend.
backend.p-2: Data is stored in PostgreSQL hosted on Neon. Entity Framework Core manages data access with automatic timestamp tracking — CreatedAt and UpdatedAt fields are set automatically on every insert and update through a custom SaveChanges override.
backend.p-3: Authorization uses a custom AuthService that verifies resource ownership by traversing entity relationships — from boards through columns and tasks down to subtasks. This ensures users can only access their own data at every level of the hierarchy.

invoiceApp.info: This application is built on MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js,React, Node.js) and focused on high performance, scalability and easy maintenance.

frontend.p-1: The frontend is built in React with TypeScript, which provides type safety and makes it easy to manage complex data structures. The application allows users to choose a language between English and Czech, improving accessibility for different users. The i18next library is used for language management.
frontend.p-2: Forms are managed using React Hook Form with data validation via the Zod library, ensuring smooth handling of user input. For data handling, I use React Query, which ensures efficient data synchronization and caching, improving the overall performance of the application.
frontend.p-3: The app is fully responsive, built with TailwindCSS, allowing for quick customization and flexible interface adaptation to different devices. Additionally, users can switch between dark and light modes, giving them the ability to customize the look of the app to their preferences.

backend.p-1: The backend runs on Express.js and is designed to be simple, robust and efficient. User authentication and management is handled using jsonwebtoken, providing secure access to protected resources. For secure password storage, bcryptjs is deployed.
backend.p-2: The database work is implemented through MongoDB and Mongoose, which ensures flexible and scalable data storage. Validation of the inputs on the backend is also done using Zod, which ensures data consistency and validity from the API level.
backend.p-3: To optimize API work and fast iterations, the application is designed according to RESTful principles, ensuring easy maintenance and extensibility.

noteApp.shortDescription: Full-stack Notes application with authentication and responsive design
noteApp.info: The Notes app is a modern, responsive and secure web application built on Next.js 15 that enables notes management with Neon serverless PostgreSQL, Server Actions, Prisma ORM and Kinde Auth authentication, while the frontend uses ShadCN UI and React Query for efficient data handling.

frontend.p-1: The app runs on Next.js 15 with React 19, which allows for fast rendering and efficient state management. App Router brings a modern approach to site management and optimizes performance.
frontend.p-2: I use TanStack React Query to sync and retrieve notes, which efficiently caches data, minimizes server requests, and supports optimistic updates.
frontend.p-3: The interface is designed with an emphasis on responsiveness and accessibility. Components from ShadCN UI ensure a consistent look and feel and a great UX on desktop and mobile devices.

backend.p-1: I use Server Actions, which allow direct manipulation of the database without the need for API endpoints. Prisma ORM ensures safe and efficient data handling.
backend.p-2: Data are stored in Neon serverless PostgreSQL, which provides a scalable database infrastructure with automatic sleep and wake-up for efficient performance and cost management.
backend.p-3: Login and user session management is handled through Kinde Auth, providing secure and seamless user authentication without the need for custom password management.

meanApp.shortDescription: Full-stack MEAN Invoice Management application with JWT authentication, AI assistant, and responsive design.
meanApp.info: Invoice Management is a modern, responsive, and secure web application built on Angular 20, enabling comprehensive invoice management with MongoDB database, Express.js backend, JWT authentication, and AI assistant, while the frontend utilizes PrimeNG UI components and RxJS for reactive data management.

frontend.p-1: The application runs on Angular 20 with Zoneless Change Detection, enabling faster rendering and more efficient state management. Standalone components bring a modern approach without NgModule and lazy loading optimizes application performance.
frontend.p-2: For synchronizing and loading invoices, I use RxJS streams with combineLatest and switchMap operators, which efficiently react to changes in user, filters, and refresh triggers. BehaviorSubject caches data and shareReplay minimizes the number of server requests.
frontend.p-3: The interface is designed with emphasis on responsiveness using PrimeNG components and Tailwind CSS. The application offers light and dark mode, desktop and mobile layouts, and includes an AI assistant for user support.

backend.p-1: The backend is built on Express.js with TypeScript and uses Mongoose ORM for MongoDB communication. RESTful API endpoints are protected by JWT middleware, which verifies user authorization with each request.
backend.p-2: Data is stored in MongoDB, which provides a flexible NoSQL database structure for invoices with nested items, addresses, and metadata. Mongoose schemas ensure data validation at the backend level.
backend.p-3: Authentication is handled via JWT tokens stored in sessionStorage with Bearer authentication scheme. The server validates tokens using the jsonwebtoken library and middleware protects all secured endpoints from unauthorized access.

Footer.text: I'm always open to collaboration or just a good chat!
